Title: Outcome Measurement Dashboard v2.0
Description: Launched redesigned provider dashboard showing PHQ-9 and GAD-7 trends over time with visual alerts for clinical deterioration. Providers can now view patient progress graphs and benchmark against network averages.

Title: Anthem Blue Cross Blue Shield National Contract
Description: Signed national contract with Anthem BCBS covering all 14 states. Expected to add 8M covered lives to Headway network. Largest single payer deal to date.

Title: 1 Million Validated Outcome Assessments Collected
Description: Headway's measurement-based care program has now collected over 1 million PHQ-9 and GAD-7 assessments. This dataset positions Headway as one of the largest sources of real-world mental health outcome data.

Title: HIPAA-Compliant Data Warehouse Migration Complete
Description: Completed migration to new cloud-native data warehouse with enhanced PHI protections row-level access controls and 10x query performance improvement for clinical analytics.

Title: Updated Prescribing Oversight Protocol
Description: Revised clinical oversight requirements for psychiatric prescribers on the platform. New protocol requires chart review of 5% of prescribing encounters monthly and mandatory case consultation for controlled substance prescriptions.

Title: Patient Insurance Eligibility Instant Verification
Description: Patients can now verify their insurance eligibility and estimated copay in under 10 seconds during booking. Reduces billing surprises and decreases post-session billing disputes by estimated 40%.

Title: 40000 Active Providers on Platform
Description: Headway network surpassed 40000 active providers across all 50 states. Average time from provider sign-up to first patient session is now 18 days.

Title: Perinatal Mental Health Specialty Track
Description: Launched specialty matching for perinatal mood and anxiety disorders. Patients can now filter for providers with perinatal mental health training. 1200 providers opted into specialty track.

Title: Automated Session Reminders with Prep Prompts
Description: Session reminders now include personalized pre-session prompts (e.g. What would you like to focus on today?) and post-session reflection questions. Early data shows 12% reduction in no-shows.

Title: Multi-State Telehealth Licensure Compact Enrollment
Description: Headway completed enrollment in the PSYPACT interstate compact for psychologists and the ASWB mobility initiative for social workers. Providers in member states can now see patients across state lines more easily.

Title: Medicaid MCO Pilot with Centene in Texas and Florida
Description: Launched pilot program with Centene-managed Medicaid plans in TX and FL. First Medicaid offering for Headway. Targeting 5000 Medicaid patients in first 6 months.

Title: Q4 2025 Outcome Report Published Internally
Description: Quarterly outcome analysis shows 62% of Headway patients with depression achieve clinically meaningful improvement (5+ point PHQ-9 reduction) within 12 sessions. Above published benchmarks.

Title: Provider EHR Integration API v2
Description: Released updated API allowing providers to sync session notes assessment scores and treatment plans between Headway and their existing EHR systems. Supports Epic Cerner and TherapyNotes.

Title: AI-Assisted Progress Note Drafting (Beta)
Description: Beta launch of AI-generated progress note drafts based on session audio (with patient consent). Providers review and edit before finalizing. 500 providers in beta. Average time saved: 8 minutes per note.

Title: Evidence-Based Treatment Matching Algorithm v3
Description: Updated treatment matching recommendations to incorporate patient preference diagnosis severity and provider modality training. New algorithm tested against expert panel recommendations with 84% concordance.
